scripts.build:css: hugo --buildDrafts && copy hugo_stats.json themes\void\hugo_stats.json > nul && cd themes\void && npx tailwindcss -i ./assets/css/main.css -o ./assets/css/style.css && cd ..\..
scripts.dev: hugo --buildDrafts && copy hugo_stats.json themes\void\hugo_stats.json > nul && start cmd /c "cd themes\void && npx tailwindcss -i ./assets/css/main.css -o ./assets/css/style.css --watch" && hugo server --buildDrafts
